creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text:
I have the same issue if I setup GTK2-Design to "Breeze" and GTK3-Design to "Breeze". But if I set other values, then the problem does not occur. For example, for GTK2-Design I have assigned "QtCurve" and for GTK3-Design I have assigned "Default". See screenshot:

http://www.ulbsd.ru/devel/gtk.png
